target: 2. Boundaries
Ginjiro Nezu
Where are you going!?

…You…?
Mio…

…Let me go back…

Going back…?
To your house!?
Alone!?
No no, what are you thinking---

Shhh…
Your voice is too loud.
…Did you forget something?

Well… that's about it…
There's no way around it, is there?

Ughhh…
Mmmmmm…

Then I'll come with you!
If it's so important to go back…

…Fine, whatever.
Follow me then…

Go wait outside. I'll be back soon.
Why are you following me normally?!

…O…
G…

Um…
Is this person…?

Ah…
It's a shadow… the wife, Kaoru.

Exactly two months ago…

At that time, when she was bathed in light,
I remembered.
The day 14 years ago… the day Ryunosuke died…

…G…
GAUU! AHH!!

…What's wrong…

…So it is.
